text.title: Usability Testing Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the usability-testing methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scope-and-segments
step.action: Name scope; name segments; size each segment to ≥5.
step.decision-gate: If any cross-segment claim is needed and `n < 5`, recruit more before proceeding.

step.name: draft-tasks
step.action: Draft 3-5 scenario-based tasks each with success_criterion.
step.decision-gate: If any task is instruction-based, rewrite before running.

step.name: session-script
step.action: Write the session script using templates/session-script.md; use neutral phrasing; human reviewer signs off.

step.name: run-sessions
step.action: Run moderated sessions; record (with consent); take notes separating observation from inference.

step.name: synthesise-and-rate
step.action: Cluster observations by symptom; compute severity from blocked-count + ≥60% threshold per r5; tag task_ref and timestamps.

step.name: human-review-and-validate
step.action: Human researcher reviews severity-1 findings; sets human_reviewed=true; run scripts/validate-usability-testing.py.
